parameters.query:
WITH recent_stats AS (
  SELECT
    ad_id,
    AVG(ctr) as avg_ctr_7d,
    STDDEV(ctr) as std_ctr_7d,
    AVG(cpc) as avg_cpc_7d,
    STDDEV(cpc) as std_cpc_7d,
    AVG(clicks) as avg_clicks_7d,
    STDDEV(clicks) as std_clicks_7d,
    AVG(postbacks_count) as avg_conversions_7d,
    COUNT(*) as data_points
  FROM ad_stats
  WHERE date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days'
    AND date < CURRENT_DATE
  GROUP BY ad_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3
),
today_stats AS (
  SELECT ad_id, ctr, cpc, clicks, shows, money, postbacks_count, roi
  FROM ad_stats
  WHERE date = CURRENT_DATE
)
SELECT
  t.ad_id,
  t.ctr as today_ctr,
  t.cpc as today_cpc,
  t.clicks as today_clicks,
  t.shows as today_shows,
  t.money as today_spend,
  t.postbacks_count as today_conversions,
  t.roi as today_roi,
  r.avg_ctr_7d,
  r.std_ctr_7d,
  r.avg_cpc_7d,
  r.std_cpc_7d,
  r.avg_clicks_7d,
  r.std_clicks_7d,
  r.avg_conversions_7d
FROM today_stats t
JOIN recent_stats r ON t.ad_id = r.ad_id;

INSERT INTO anomalies (ad_id, anomaly_type, severity, description, metric_name, expected_value, actual_value, deviation_percent)
VALUES (
  {{ $json.ad_id }},
  '{{ $json.type }}',
  '{{ $json.severity }}',
  '{{ $json.description.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.metric }}',
  {{ $json.expected || 0 }},
  {{ $json.actual || 0 }},
  {{ $json.deviation || 0 }}
);
